parameters.name: proximity
parameters.label: Connect Closest Ends
parameters.description: Start stitching at the two closest points, and handle arbitrary face orientation and start vertices.

parameters.name: closeu
parameters.label: U Wrap
parameters.description: Close the stitch in U (close each cross-section).

parameters.name: creategroup
parameters.label: Create Polygon Group
parameters.description: Place the generated triangles into a group.

parameters.name: polygroup
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: Specify the name of the group here when the above parameter Create = On.

parameters.name: method
parameters.label: Method
parameters.description: Selects how to perform the lofting/stitching.

parameters.name: point
parameters.label: Point Group
parameters.description: Sequence of point sets to be stitched.
